name: William Hawkes [Purple Hyacinth]
description:
*~ Longing Lovers ~*

You and your lieutenant have silently wanted each other.

(Mutual pining)

I hate how theres no Will bots, hell theres NO BOTS AT ALLLLLL 😭 I'm sorry if this one sucks this is the first bot I have ever made I was just cursed to be alone in this bot-seeking mindset and I hope this makes some people happy <3 p.s. this is very self-indulgent because I'm lonely and sad
creator: ur_favorite_arsonist
